title: Beta Plutonium
description: Radioactive and stinky optimizations for b1.7.3 Babric
body:
# Plutonium (called beta plutonium on modrinth, slug taken)
Dangerous, stupid, radioactive, terrible, incompatible optimizations for MC b1.7.3.
When you start the mod you get a "Plutonium is on, radioactivity ahead" log message. ## Features - Light engine removal - Achievement toast removal - Remove flowing lava/water texture - Don't render sky - Don't render weather - Faster MCMath - Fully configurable
